steps.t: Lagordal has asked you to investigate a suspicious camp-site atop a cliff. The cliff can be found to the south-east, next to the waterfall opposite of…
Whoever made this camp-site may have left something behind. You should search the camp-site for information.
You have found a couple of signs of life at this camp-site. You should examine the footprints for more information.
The moment you tried to examine footprints at the camp-site, a Dunlending attacked you. You should return to Lagordal with this news.
